commands: jq summaries over required handoff JSON files
pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error final_report.tex (run 1, failed: text-mode underscore in SU(2)_D macro)
pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error final_report.tex (run 2, failed: macro used display math delimiter inside display equation)
pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error final_report.tex (run 3, failed: missing amssymb for varnothing)
pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error final_report.tex (run 4, succeeded with unresolved references pending rerun)
warnings: Report run_status is warning because the upstream pipeline has warning statuses and the final interpretation is conditional.
The exact core model is not novel; arXiv:2109.11558 is same-model precedent.
PTA result depends on DBF template validity at extremely large alpha and on backend efficiency/wall-dynamics assumptions.
Constraints stage did not derive an exclusion mostly because thermal-history, BBN/CMB, Delta N_eff, relic-density, and self-interaction observables are missing.
One decoupled-hidden-sector constraints item in handoff_constraints.json was citation_verified=false and was not cited in the final bibliography.
LaTeX completed with nonfatal typography/caption warnings: underfull boxes, one 4.96 pt overfull hbox, and caption hypcap warnings.
approximations: FOPT results use the semianalytic conformal high-temperature/polynomial backend and Gaussian percolation approximation from handoff_fopt.json.
PTA benchmark and PTArcade spectra use the DBF template with backend defaults; wall velocity and microscopic efficiency are not independently computed.

The report uses handoff citation_verified metadata and excludes unverified citations; no broad literature re-search was performed beyond handoff metadata because the required citations were already marked verified.

included_sections.name: Summary
notes: Preserves minimal conformal SU(2)_D doublet conclusion, same-model precedent, FOPT/PTA outputs, and caveats.

included_sections.name: Prompt
notes: Exact original prompt included as provided.

included_sections.name: Model description
notes: Uses critic-authoritative vector-mass convention m_WD = gD chi / 2.

included_sections.name: Pipeline status
notes: Table distinguishes ok from warning statuses.

included_sections.name: Preliminary literature search
notes: Includes arXiv:2109.11558 same-model precedent and convention warning.

included_sections.name: FOPT results
notes: Includes scan summary, representative steering points, and backend caveats.

included_sections.name: PTA results
notes: Includes benchmark score 13/14, PTArcade MAP/posterior, N_samples=100000, DBF template choice, and caveats.

included_sections.name: Constraints
notes: Includes direct, not-applicable, and requires-new-backend classification and missing calculations.

included_sections.name: Assumptions and limitations
notes: Emphasizes high-severity thermal-history, cosmology, dark-matter, and template-validity limitations.

included_sections.name: Conclusions
notes: Separates robust, conditional, blocked, and uncontrolled claims.

included_sections.name: Reference list
notes: Only citation-verified or standard bibliographic entries from handoff metadata were cited; citation_verified=false item was excluded.

figures_included.label: fig:pta_benchmark
figures_included.caption: Benchmark DBF spectrum compared with PTA violin windows. The best benchmark score is 13/14.

figures_included.label: fig:pta_ptarcade
figures_included.caption: PTArcade MAP DBF spectrum for the accepted widened-prior run.

figures_included.label: fig:pta_posteriors
figures_included.caption: PTArcade posterior distributions for the fitted parameter basis.

tables_included.label: tab:fopt
tables_included.caption: Representative FOPT steering points.
notes: f_est values are order-of-magnitude steering estimates only.

tables_included.label: tab:constraints
tables_included.caption: Constraint classification.
notes: No exclusion means no exclusion with available observables, not proven viability.

compile_errors: Runs 1-3 failed during iterative LaTeX syntax fixes before the final source was produced: unsafe SU(2)_D macro in text, macro delimiter use inside display math, and missing amssymb for varnothing.
Final run succeeded and produced a readable 8-page PDF. Remaining log messages are nonfatal typography/caption warnings: underfull boxes, one 4.96 pt overfull hbox, and caption hypcap warnings.
